instructions_to_main_agent: Phase 0.1: Fix applyTorch in src/hooks/useTorch.ts to return Promise<boolean> instead of swallowing errors. Ensure errors propagate to the strobe loop.
Phase 0.2: Add NaN/zero guard to createScreenStrobe in src/lib/strobe.ts: `if (isNaN(hz) || isNaN(duty) || hz <= 0 || !isFinite(hz)) { rafId = requestAnimationFrame(frame); return; }`
Phase 0.3: Add window.addFlags(WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_KEEP_SCREEN_ON) to MainActivity.java to prevent screen sleep during sessions.
Phase 0.4: Save MediaStream reference in useTorch.ts and ensure all tracks are stopped in releaseTorch: `stream?.getTracks().forEach(t => t.stop())` to prevent camera leaks.

Phase 1.1: Optimize Session.tsx performance by decoupling screenOn from React state. Use React refs (`useRef<HTMLDivElement>`) and direct DOM manipulation (`ref.current.style.opacity`) for the strobe flash overlay to avoid render storms.
Phase 1.2: Add `visibilitychange` listener in Session.tsx. On `hidden`: pause strobe/audio, stop torch. On `visible`: navigate back to Home screen to prevent stale state.
Phase 1.3: Track consecutive `applyTorch` failures in the strobe engine. Fallback to screen mode after 3 failures and trigger a UI toast ('Torch unavailable — using screen mode').
Phase 2.1: Keep scoped permission grant in Android WebChromeClient as requested.
Phase 2.2: Cap session duration at 30 minutes. Use `performance.now()` for timing instead of `Date.now()` to prevent clock drift issues.
Phase 3.1: Enable R8/ProGuard rules in Android app.
Phase 3.2: Remove unnecessary FLASHLIGHT permission from AndroidManifest.xml.
Phase 3.3: Implement network security config as required for the webview.
Phase 3.4: Connect `onBeat` callback in src/lib/audio.ts for audio-visual sync (only for minimal sound type).
Phase 4.1: Write tests for `getParamsAt` guards (zero-duration, negative time, NaN values).
Phase 4.2: Write tests for `applyTorch` failure detection and fallback.
Phase 4.3: Update Home.tsx PresetCard to conditionally display `feasible={true}` based on `torchFeasible(preset.hz, preset.duty)` and indicate screen-only presets.
Phase 4.4: Add audio context overlap guard in `createAudio` to prevent double-start/overlapping sessions.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, preset cards) must include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='preset-card-gamma-40').
